targets.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and r._field == "best_lap_time_seconds") |> last()
from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and r._field == "last_lap_time_seconds") |> last()
from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and r._field == "speed_kph")
from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and r._field == "incidents") |> last()

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "lap_delta_to_best_lap_seconds" or r._field == "lap_delta_to_session_best_seconds" or r._field == "lap_delta_to_optimal_lap_seconds" or r._field == "current_lap_time_seconds" or r._field == "lap_distance_pct")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "speed_kph" or r._field == "rpm" or r._field == "gear" or r._field == "position_overall" or r._field == "position_class")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "throttle_raw" or r._field == "throttle" or r._field == "brake_raw" or r._field == "brake" or r._field == "clutch" or r._field == "steering_wheel_angle" or r._field == "brake_abs_active")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "lat_accel" or r._field == "long_accel" or r._field == "vert_accel" or r._field == "velocity_x" or r._field == "velocity_y" or r._field == "velocity_z" or r._field == "yaw_rate" or r._field == "roll" or r._field == "pitch")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "fuel_level_liters" or r._field == "fuel_use_per_hour" or r._field == "session_time_remaining_seconds" or r._field == "session_laps_remaining" or r._field == "engine_warnings" or r._field == "warning_water_temp" or r._field == "warning_oil_temp" or r._field == "warning_oil_pressure" or r._field == "warning_fuel_pressure" or r._field == "warning_pit_limiter")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "track_temp_c" or r._field == "track_temp_crew_c" or r._field == "air_temp_c" or r._field == "water_temp_c" or r._field == "oil_temp_c" or r._field == "relative_humidity_pct" or r._field == "precipitation_pct" or r._field == "track_wetness" or r._field == "weather_declared_wet" or r._field == "wind_vel_mps" or r._field == "wind_dir_rad")) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "track_x_m" or r._field == "track_y_m" or r._field == "speed_kph")) |> aggregateWindow(every: 500ms, fn: last, createEmpty: false) |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.track_x_m and exists r.track_y_m) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "track_x_m", "track_y_m", "speed_kph"])

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iracing_telemetry" and (r._field == "current_lap" or r._field == "completed_laps" or r._field == "best_lap_time_seconds" or r._field == "last_lap_time_seconds" or r._field == "fuel_level_liters" or r._field == "fuel_level_pct" or r._field == "player_tire_compound" or r._field == "tire_sets_available" or r._field == "tire_sets_used" or r._field == "pit_service_tire_compound" or r._field == "pit_service_lf_pressure" or r._field == "pit_service_rf_pressure" or r._field == "pit_service_lr_pressure" or r._field == "pit_service_rr_pressure" or r._field == "player_car_power_adjust" or r._field == "push_to_pass_count" or r._field == "session_number" or r._field == "session_state" or r._field == "track_wetness" or r._field == "weather_declared_wet")) |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
